info.longName: Innovator Growth-100 Power Buffer ETF - October

funds_data.description: The fund invests under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in investments that provide exposure to the Invesco QQQ Trust SM, Series 1 (the “Underlying ETF”). FLEX Options are exchange-traded option contracts with uniquely customizable terms. It is non-diversified.
